nodes.label: sanad-dashboard-dark.png
nodes.summary: Dark-themed UI screenshot of the Sanad dashboard — an operational dashboard for Saudi legal and SME professionals. Shows a left sidebar with navigation (Dashboard, Compliance, Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks, Documents), a main content area with greeting, KPI cards (active cases, open tasks, billable time in SAR, focus timer), compliance deadline list, today's priorities, and a Daily Brief news feed from Saudi government agencies (MoJ, MHRSD, ZATCA). PWA-enabled with dual Gregorian/Hijri calendar support. Footer reads: 'Sanad — Operational dashboard for Saudi legal & SME professionals · Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'.

nodes.label: Sanad Dashboard (concept)
nodes.summary: Main operational dashboard view for Sanad app. Displays KPI summary cards (active cases count, open tasks count, billable time today in SAR, focus time today), urgent alerts (expiring compliance items, urgent cases needing same-day action), today's priorities task list, and expiring compliance deadlines with countdown bars.

nodes.label: Compliance Tracking (concept)
nodes.summary: Feature for tracking expiring compliance deadlines for clients (e.g., GOSI Filing, Commercial Registration, Iqama Renewal, VAT Return). Dashboard shows items with days-left countdown and color-coded urgency. Integrates with Saudi regulatory bodies: GOSI, MHRSD, ZATCA.

nodes.label: Daily Brief News Feed (concept)
nodes.summary: Right-panel news feed in the dashboard showing updates from Saudi government agencies: Ministry of Justice (MoJ), MHRSD (Ministry of Human Resources), and ZATCA (Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority). Articles include e-litigation portal updates, remote work policy changes, and tax news relevant to legal professionals.

nodes.label: Deep Work / Focus Timer (concept)
nodes.summary: Focus and deep-work tracking feature visible in the dashboard. Dashboard shows 'Focus today: 45m 00s' KPI card and a 'Start focus' action button. Navigation includes a dedicated 'Deep Work' section. Promotes distraction-free work sessions for legal professionals.

nodes.label: Billing & Time Tracking (concept)
nodes.summary: Billable time tracking shown in dashboard KPI card: '1h 30m / 1,275 SAR' for billable activity today. Tracks time in hours/minutes and converts to Saudi Riyal billing amounts.

nodes.label: Dual Calendar Support (concept)
nodes.summary: Dashboard displays both Gregorian and Hijri (Islamic lunar) calendar dates simultaneously. Example shown: 'Saturday, 20 June 2026 · Muharram 5, 1448 AH'. This is a design decision for Saudi legal context where both calendars are in official use.

nodes.label: PWA Design Pattern (concept)
nodes.summary: App is PWA-enabled with installability to desktop. Sidebar notes: 'PWA-enabled. Install to desktop for daily access.' and 'Timer & UI state cached locally — minimal server load.' Footer: 'Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'. Design optimized for home-server deployment.

nodes.label: Sidebar Navigation Layout (concept)
nodes.summary: Left sidebar navigation with items: Dashboard (active), Compliance (badge: 4), Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks (badge: 8), Documents. Dark background sidebar. Top shows Sanad logo with Arabic text 'سند — Daily Operations'. Bottom shows user avatar 'N' and PWA notes.
